source_pr.title: lightning: migrate test-infra to tesify for lightning_test.go
source_pr.body:
This closes #28245 .

Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.
failure_signature: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Global state must be reset/restored between tests. This PR stabilizes it by: -// multi times, hence data race may happen.
fix_pattern: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.

evidence: evidence: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.
